pymdp
  • Algos
  • View page source

Algos

Lower-level variational and message-passing routines for discrete POMDP models live in pymdp.algos (single Python module pymdp.algos). Public entry points include fixed-point iteration (FPI), marginal message passing (MMP), variational message passing (VMP), hybrid/padded variants used by optimized inference paths, and exact single-factor HMM smoothing helpers.

The Sphinx pages FPI (fixed-point iteration) and MMP (marginal message passing) document the main FPI and MMP callables. Other symbols remain available from the module docstring and source; see inference for how agents invoke this layer.

Legacy: NumPy implementations are under pymdp.legacy.algos (not covered by these autodoc pages).

See also

  • docxology/docs/validation_matrix.md — tests and examples mapped to inference

  • examples/inference_and_learning/inference_methods_comparison.ipynb — runnable gallery notebook
